doc_title: Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act — 5-Day Notice
label: partial
reason: The core 5-day notice rule under 735 ILCS 5/9-209 is real, but service details and the email-consent clause appear paraphrased or invented rather than actual statutory text.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 78
REASON: The 5-day notice rule under 735 ILCS 5/9-209 is genuine, but the "Service Requirements" paragraph (especially the email-consent language) and other details appear paraphrased/invented rather than conformed statutory text.
